raw_response:
```json
{
  "communicative_function": "The statement is conveying the idea of self-responsibility and self-determination.",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "Individuals have the power to shape their own identity and destiny.",
    "Personal development is a result of conscious choices and actions.",
    "External circumstances are not the sole determinants of a person's character."
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "The statement is coherent in reiterating the theme of self-determination. It maintains logical consistency by attributing the role of creator to the individual in shaping their own life.",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The statement is useful in contexts where personal agency and self-improvement are possible and valued. It is particularly useful in motivational and self-help frameworks that emphasize individual responsibility.",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "The statement may be misleading in contexts where individuals face systemic or insurmountable barriers that limit their control over their circumstances. It can also be misleading if interpreted as dismissing external factors entirely."
}
```

parsed_json.communicative_function: The statement is conveying the idea of self-responsibility and self-determination.
implicit_claims: Individuals have the power to shape their own identity and destiny.
Personal development is a result of conscious choices and actions.
External circumstances are not the sole determinants of a person's character.
parsed_json.coherence_assessment: The statement is coherent in reiterating the theme of self-determination. It maintains logical consistency by attributing the role of creator to the individual in shaping their own life.
parsed_json.conditions_for_usefulness: The statement is useful in contexts where personal agency and self-improvement are possible and valued. It is particularly useful in motivational and self-help frameworks that emphasize individual responsibility.
parsed_json.conditions_for_misleading: The statement may be misleading in contexts where individuals face systemic or insurmountable barriers that limit their control over their circumstances. It can also be misleading if interpreted as dismissing external factors entirely.
